title: Mia trelli... trelli oikogeneia
overview: The Micah is a young woman living in a crazy ... family. Her mother, Flora paste is barmy, her little sister and almost uncontrollable divorced her mother's father, is good but cowardly and soft. Is engaged with Miki, but one day before their marriage goes to Venice and there married Andrew, who after knowing the nature and discovers her family separates Mika and undertakes to reason with them. He tries to bring his father in law at home through a fake fiancée but he discovers.
